title: Proclamation No. 459, s. 1965
text:
MALACAÑANG

RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 459

TRANSFERRING THE OWNERSHIP TO THE MINDANAO DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY CERTAIN PARCELS OF LAND SITUATED AT SASA, CITY OF DAVAO.

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the provisions of Section 39 of Republic Act No. 3034, I, Diosdado Macapagal, President of the Philippines, do : hereby transfer in fee simple to the Mindanao Development Authority, subject to private rights, if any, certain portions of the private domain of the Government situated at Sasa, City of Davao, including the foreshores thereof, which lands are more particularly described as follows:

Parcel 1 Lot No. 569-C-2-B, Psd-16469

Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan which is b 14° 33′ E 497.02 meters from BLLM No. 6 , Cad-102 (Davao Cadastre) thence S 1° 11′ E 50.00 meters to point 2; S 1° 10′ E 202.67 meters to point 3; N 24° 37′ W 126.13 meters to point.4; N 24° 38′ W 180.02 meters to joint 5; S 78° 09′ E 25.02 meters to point 6; S 78° 09′ E 100.00 meters to point 1 point of beginning. Containing 15,390 square meters.

Bounded on the east along lines 1-2-3, by Lot No. 569-C-2-A, Psd-16469; on the southwest along lines 3-4-5, by the National Highway (Lot No. 569-0,-2-0, Psd-16469)

All points referred .to are-indicated on the plan and marked on the ground as follows: Point 1, 2, 3, 4 and 5, BPW/DCSM concrete monument; and. point 6, old PLS concrete monument, Bearings true. Declination 0° 51′ E’ Surveyed June 15-17, 1939. Approved November 16, 1939.

Parcel 2 Lot No. 569-C-2-A, Psd-16469

Beginning at a point marked on plan which is S 14° 33′ E 497.02 meters from BLLM No. 6, Cad-102 (Davao Cadastre) thence S 78° 09′ E 150.00 meters to point 2; S 0° 01′ E 62.48 meters to point 3; S.8°02′ E.65.23 meters to point 4; S 27° 39′ E 80.21 meters to point 5;. S 2° 09′ E 38.64 meters to. point 6; S 5° 07′ W 116.80 meters to point 7; N 85° 46′ W 132.15 meters to point 8; N 17° 21′ W 7.48 maters to point 9; N.18° 29′ W 20.15 meters to point 10; N 19° 39′ W 20.15 meters to point 11; N 20° 50′ W 20.16 meters to point 12; N 22° 00′ W 20.16 meters to point 13; N 23° 10′ W 22.17 meters to point 14; N 1° 10′ W 202.67 meters to point 15; N 1° 11′ W 50.00 meters to point 1 point of beginning. Containing 57,635 square meters.

Bounded on the north along line 1-2, by Lot No. 575-A-1, Psd-16468; on the east along lines 2-3-4-5-6-7 by the Gulf of Davao; on the south along lines 7-8 by Lot No., 568-A, Psd-16470; on the southwest along lines 8-9-10-11-12-13-14-15 by the National Highway (Lot No. 569-C-2-C, Bsd-16469) and ;the west along lines 15-16-1 by Lot No.-569-C-2-B, Psd-16469.

All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground as follows: Point 1, 8, 9, 11, 13, 15 and 16, BPW/ DCSM concrete monument point 2 and 7 old. BL concrete monument; all other points, stakes. Bearings true. Declination Surveyed June 15-17, 1939. Approved November 16, 1939.

Parcel 3 Lot No. 568-A, Psd-16470

Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan which is N 13° 52′ W 566.94 meters from BLLM No. 5, Cad-102 (Davao Cadastre) thence N 9° 30′ W 14.18 meters to point 2; N 11° 30′ W 20.15 meters to point 3; N 12 o 24′ W 20.15 meters to point 4; N 13° 50′ W 20.15 meters to point 5; N 15° ’09’ W 20.16 meters to point 6; N 16° 10′ 20.16 meters to point 7; N 17° 18′ W 12.67 meters to point 8; S 85° 46′ E 132.15 meters to: point 9; S 10° 08′ E 42.99 meters to point. 10; S 7°, 19′ E. 44.05 .meters, to point 11; S 17° 17′ E 22.14 meters to point 12; S 86° 42′ E 121.53 meters to point 1 .point of beginning. Containing 14,302 square meters.

Bounded on the west along lines 1-2-3-4-5-6-7-8, by the National Highway (Lot No. 568-B, Psd-16470) on the north along line 8-9, by Lot No. 569-C-2-A, by the Gulf of Davao; and: in the south along line 12-1, by Lot No. 664-A, Psd-16951.

All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground as follows: Point 1, old PLS concrete monument; point 2, 4, 6 and 8, BPW/DCSM concrete, monument; point 9 and 12, old B.L. concrete monument; point 3, 5, 7, 10, and 11 Stakes Bearings true. Declination 0° 51′ E. Surveyed June 15-17, 1939. Approved November, 16, 1939.

Parcel 4 Lot No. 664-A, Psd-16951

Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan which is N 13° 52′ W 566.94 meters from BLLM No. 5, Cad-102 (Davao Cadastre) thence N 86° 42′ E 121.53 meters to point 2; S 25° 49’E 49′ E 50.80 meters to point 3; S 9° 09′ E 77.97 meters to point 4; S 13° 12′. E 22.76 meters to point 5; S 86°, 46′ W 146.02 meters to point 6; N 2° 28′ W 41.62 meters to point 7; N 5° 27′ W 39.00 meters to point 8; N 7°,25′ W 40.31 meters to point 9; N 9° 52′ W 26.13 meters to point 1 point of beginning. Containing 20,000 square meters.

Bounded on the north along line 1-2 by Lot No. 568-A, Psd-16470; on the east, along lines 2-3-4-5 by the Gulf of Davao; on the south along lines 5-6 by Lot No. 1846-D, Psd-16952; and, on the west along lines 6-7-8-9-1, by the National Highway (Lot No. 1846-E, Psd-16952).

All points referred to’ are indicated on the plan and. marked on the ground as follows: Point 1, old PLS concrete monument; point 2, old B.L. concrete monument; point, 5, 6, 7, 8, and 9 BPW/DCSM monument; point 3 and 4, stakes. Bearings true. Declination 0° 50′. Surveyed June 15-17, 1939. Approved May 22, 1940.

Parcel 5 Lot No. 1846-D, Psd-16952

Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan which is N 16° 38′. W 421.95 meters from BLLM No. 5, Cad-102 (Davao Cadastre) thence N 86° 46′ E 146,02 meters to point 2; S 13° 12′ E, 30.42 meters to point 3; S .86° .12′, W 152.10 meters to point 4; N. 1°, 44’W 31.49 meters to point 1,u point of beginning. Containing 4,581 square meters.

Bounded, on the north along lines 1-2 by Lot No. 664-A, Psd-16951; on the east, along line 2-3, by the Gulf of Davao; on the south along lines 3-4, by Lot No, 1846-C, Psd-16952; and on the west, along line 4-1, by the National Highway (Lot No. 1846-E, Psd-16952).

All points referred to are indicated on the plan, and marked on the ground as follows: Point. 1 and 2, BPW/DCSM concrete monuments, point 3 and 4, old PLS concrete monument. Bearings true. Declination 0° 50′ E. Surveyed June 15-17, and December 15, 1939. Approved July 10, 1940.

Parcel 6 Lot No. 1846-C, Psd-16952

Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan which is N 85° 35′ W 109.32 meters from BLLM No. 5, Cad-102 (Davao Cadastre) thence N 1° 44′ W 250.00 meters to point 2; N 1° 44′ W 112.68 meters to point 3; N. 86° 12′ E 152.10 meters to point 4; S 13° 12′ E 16.75 meters to point 5; S 5° 47′ E 100.46 meters to point 6; S 4° 47′ E’102,12’meters : to point 7; S 0° 05′ E 74.41 meters to point 8; S 21° 41′ W 123.94 meters to point ‘9; N 73° 36’ W 122.87 meters to point 1 point of beginning. Containing 61,107 square meters.

Bounded on the wets along lines 1-2-3 by the National Highway; , Lot No. 1846-E, Psd-16952; on the north along line 3-4 by Lot No. 1846-D, Psd-16952; on the east along lines 4-5-6-7-8. by the Gulf of Davao; and on the south along line 9-1, by Lot No. 564-A, Psd-16471.

All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground as follows: Point 1 and 2, BPW/DCSM concrete monument; point 3 and 4, old PLS concrete monument; point 9, old BL concrete monument and points 5, 6, 7 and 8 old stakes. Bearings true. Declinations 0° 50′ E Surveyed June 15-17 and Decemober 15, 1939. Approved July 10, 1940.

Parcel 7 Lot No. 564-A, Psd-16471

Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan which is S 8° 26′ W 614.16 meters from BLLM No. 5, Cad-102 (Davao Cadastre) thence N 1° 44′ W 201.90 meters to point 2; N 1° 44′ W 250.00 meters to point 3; N 1° 44′ W 166.22 meters to point 4; S 73° 36′ W 122.87 meters to point 5; S 3° 04′ W 601.76 meters to point 6; N 75° 09′ W 69.30 meters to point 1, point of beginning. Containing 56,500 square meters.

Bounded on the west along lines 1-2-3-4 by the National Highway, (Lot No. 564-B, Psd-16471) on the north along line 4-5 by Lot No. 1846-C, Psd-16952; on the east along line 5-6 by the Gulf of Davao; and on the south along line 6-1, by Lot No. 1242-A, Psd-O o 16472.

All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground as follows: Point 1; old PLS concrete monument; points 2, 3 and 4, BPW/DCSM concrete monument; and 5 and 6, old monument. Bearings true. Declination 0° 54′ E. Surveyed June 15-17, 1939.

Parcel 8 Lot No. 1242-A, Psd-16472

Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan which is S 8° 26′ W 614.16 meters from BLLM No. 5, Cad-102 (Davao Cadastre) thence S 75° 09′ E 69.30 meters to point 2; S 2° 47′ E 85.17 meters to point 3; S 1° 25′ W 44.83 meters to point 4; N 84° 29′ W 65.70 meters to point 5; N 1° 52′ W 141.40 meters to point 1, point of beginning Containing 9,070 square meters.

Bounded on the north, along line 1-2 by Lot No. 564-A, Psd-16471; on the east along lines 2-3-4 by the Gulf of Davao; on the south along line 4 5, by ; Lot No. 1472-B-3, Psd-14384; and on the west along line 5-1 by the National Highway;

All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground as follows: Point 1, old PLS concrete monument; point, 2, old monument; point 3 old stake; and point 4 and 5 BPW/DCSM concrete monument. Bearings true. Declination 0° 51′ E. Points referred to marked on Bureau of Lands Plan Psd-16472. Surveyed June 15-17, 1939. Approved November 16, 1939.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be, affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 25th day of September, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-five, and of the Independence of the Philippines, the sixty-seventh.

DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL President of the Philippines

By the President: SALVADOR L. MARIÑO Acting Executive Secretary

Source : University of the Philippines, College of Law Library
